import os
import numpy as np
os.chdir('/opt/habitat-lab-src')

import habitat
from habitat.config.default import get_config
from habitat.config import read_write

cfg_path = (
    "/opt/habitat-lab-src/habitat-lab/habitat/config/"
    "benchmark/multi_agent/hssd_spot_human_social_nav.yaml"
)
config = get_config(cfg_path)
with read_write(config):
    config.habitat.simulator.scene_dataset = (
        "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/hab3_bench_assets/hab3-hssd/"
        "hab3-hssd.scene_dataset_config.json"
    )
    config.habitat.dataset.scenes_dir = "/opt/habitat-lab-src/data/scene_datasets"

with habitat.Env(config=config) as env:
    obs = env.reset()
    
    spot_data = env.sim.get_agent_data(0)
    human_data = env.sim.get_agent_data(1)
    
    P = np.array(spot_data.articulated_agent.base_pos)
    H = np.array(human_data.articulated_agent.base_pos)
    trans = np.array(spot_data.articulated_agent.base_transformation)
    
    compass = obs["agent_0_goal_to_agent_gps_compass"]
    dist, alpha = compass[0], compass[1]
    
    action = {
        "action": ("agent_0_base_velocity", "agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action"),
        "action_args": {
            "agent_0_base_vel": np.array([1.0, 0.0], dtype=np.float32),
            "agent_1_oracle_nav_randcoord_action": np.array([1.0], dtype=np.float32),
        },
    }
    env.step(action)
    
    spot_data = env.sim.get_agent_data(0)
    P2 = np.array(spot_data.articulated_agent.base_pos)
    
    F = P2 - P
    F_angle = np.arctan2(F[2], F[0])
    
    print("Actual F_angle:", F_angle)
    
    print("trans X angle:", np.arctan2(trans[2, 0], trans[0, 0]))
    print("trans Y angle:", np.arctan2(trans[2, 1], trans[0, 1]))
    print("trans Z angle:", np.arctan2(trans[2, 2], trans[0, 2]))
    print("trans -Z angle:", np.arctan2(-trans[2, 2], -trans[0, 2]))
    print("trans -X angle:", np.arctan2(-trans[2, 0], -trans[0, 0]))
    
    D = H - P
    D_angle = np.arctan2(D[2], D[0])
    print("compass alpha:", alpha)
    print("D_angle - F_angle:", (D_angle - F_angle + np.pi) % (2*np.pi) - np.pi)
    print("F_angle - D_angle:", (F_angle - D_angle + np.pi) % (2*np.pi) - np.pi)
    print("-(F_angle - D_angle):", -(F_angle - D_angle + np.pi) % (2*np.pi) - np.pi)
    print("-(D_angle - F_angle):", -(D_angle - F_angle + np.pi) % (2*np.pi) - np.pi)
